title: Microsoft Purview Unified Catalog — governance domains
description: Desired state for Unified Catalog governance domains consumed by scripts/Deploy-UnifiedCatalog.ps1 (tracked in #340). Reference: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/purview/unified-catalog. Per ADR 0024, Microsoft Learn does not yet document the Unified Catalog REST data-plane surface; the field shape below reflects the concept-page model and will be tightened when the authoring-surface ADR lands.

items.description: List of governance domains. Default state is the empty list.

name.description: Display name. Unique across the file.

type.description: Domain category. Enum reflects the Unified Catalog UI options as of 2026-05-24.

owners.description: Entra group display names. Resolved at deploy time per ADR 0023.
